action_set_definitions.name: get_sensor_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time metrics from the wastewater treatment plant sensors.

action_set_definitions.name: get_lab_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the latest biological diagnostic report to identify specific filamentous bacteria or microbial health issues.

example_output.observation_notes: Significant foaming and bridge formation observed in secondary clarifiers.

action_set_definitions.name: get_operation_sop
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the facility's Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) database for specific scenario requirements and legal discharge limits.

scenario_id.description: The name or ID of the scenario (e.g., 'Condition B').

action_set_definitions.name: update_control_setpoints
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the plant control systems with new operational parameters to adjust the biological process.

target_wastage_rate_m3_d.description: The new rate for excess sludge removal.

internal_recycle_m3_h.description: Optional: Update internal recycle rate to manage organic load.

state_description.influent_flow_rate: The rate of raw wastewater entering the system (m³/h).
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mg_L: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in the aeration tank (mg/L).
state_description.mlss_mg_L: Mixed Liquor Suspended Solids, representing the concentration of biomass (mg/L).
state_description.effluent_cod_mg_L: Chemical Oxygen Demand in the treated water (mg/L).
state_description.internal_recycle_flow: Rate of nitrate-rich liquor recycled from aerobic to anoxic zones (m³/h).
state_description.sludge_wastage_rate: Rate at which excess sludge is removed from the system (m³/d).
state_description.energy_consumption_kwh: Cumulative energy used by blowers and pumps in the current cycle.
